creator: eimar.koort@tutamail.com
text:
Hi,

I did some tests.
"Nfs hosts" were up to date, but not the hosts where ports were on local
disk (20130612 issue). I still can't build when ports are mounted over NFS.
But that's not problem, because it builds fine, when ports are on local
disk.

So two different problems overlapped eachother and created confusion.
This BR can be closed.

Thanks

--
Eimar Koort
( eimar.koort@gmail.com )
